rows.notes: Taken from gemini-flash, which correctly identified this header missed by gpt-5-mini.

rows.description: P.d Povier, Smith, Bill from Feby 1762. —
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent between extractors. Description taken from gemini-flash as it is more accurate to the image.
rows.section_header: L: S: D:
rows.english_description: Payment to Povier Smith for an invoice dated February 1762.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Povier Smith for an invoice dated February 1762, amounting to £18 12s 11d.

rows.description: P.d a second Bill to assignees of D: Collins
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amount of 0.9.6. gpt-5-mini's 0.19.6 is incorrect. gemini-flash description is also more accurate.
rows.section_header: L: S: D:
rows.english_description: Payment of a second bill to the assignees of D. Collins.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of a second bill to the assignees of D. Collins, amounting to £0 9s 6d.

rows.description: May 26. P.d Mr Rowlins for a Bond to pr D.d Turner
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description taken from gemini-flash as it is more accurate to the image, particularly 'Rowlins' and 'D.d'.
rows.section_header: L: S: D:
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Rowlins for preparing a bond relating to Dr D. Turner.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Rowlins for preparing a bond relating to Dr D. Turner, amounting to £0 6s 6d.

rows.description: P.d Ditto for certifacts & Stamps to Guernsey &c —
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description taken from gemini-flash as it is slightly more accurate to the image for 'P.d', 'certifacts', 'Stamps', and the trailing dash.
rows.section_header: L: S: D:
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Rowlins for certificates and postage/stamps for Guernsey and related matters.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Rowlins for certificates and stamps for Guernsey and related matters, amounting to £1 1s 0d.

rows.description: -28 Gave Mr Parker apothecary's Bond for a platate -Book formerly of Mr Claggett, kindly sent by his Master
rows.notes: Chosen from gemini-flash. It correctly combines the two physical lines into a single entry with the amount. gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this into two entries and had several description inaccuracies. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amount.
rows.section_header: L: S: D:
rows.english_description: Gift/payment to Mr Parker (apothecary) concerning an apothecary's bond for a plate-book formerly belonging to Mr Claggett.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Gift/payment to Mr Parker (apothecary) concerning an apothecary's bond for a plate-book formerly belonging to Mr Claggett, amounting to £0 2s 6d.

rows.description: P.d Painters Bills for y.e Hall &c —
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Combined description: 'P.d' and trailing dash from gemini-flash, 'Painters' from gpt-5-mini. 'y.e' from gemini-flash looks more accurate than 'ye' in the image.
rows.section_header: L: S: D:
rows.english_description: Payment of painters' bills for the Hall and related painting work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of painters' bills for the Hall and related painting work, amounting to £14 7s 6d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amount and type. Visual confirmation of total and lack of description.

rows.description: Jun 25 At a meeting of the Society upon the Business of Executing y.e Lease of Merton Estate to Mr Oswald Jackson, & settling accts with P.r D.d Turner & with Mr Clarke & Brewster Clerk to y.e Commission, -
rows.notes: Chosen from gemini-flash. It correctly combines the multi-line header into a single logical header. gpt-5-mini split it into three and had several description inaccuracies. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description.
rows.section_header: Jun 25 At a meeting of the Society upon the Business of Executing y.e Lease of Merton Estate to Mr Oswald Jackson, & settling accts with P.r D.d Turner & with Mr Clarke & Brewster Clerk to y.e Commission, -

rows.english_description: Payment of Mr Clarke's bill in connection with the meeting about executing the Merton estate lease and settling related accounts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Mr Clarke's bill in connection with the meeting about executing the Merton estate lease and settling related accounts, amounting to £22 9s 6.75d.

rows.description: P.d Mr Jackson a Ballance on P.r D.d Turner's account

rows.description: P.d Mr Jackson on James Preston's acct a 2d Salary advanc'd by him by Curate of Merton to Mid: 1763.
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. Description from gemini-flash for accuracy, specifically 'P.d', 'Preston's', 'a 2d Salary advanc'd', and 'Curate...Mid: 1763.'.

rows.description: July 4. P.d D.r Kennicott 5th Subscription for 1764. —
rows.notes: Consensus on amount. Description combines elements for accuracy: 'P.d D.r' and trailing dash from gemini-flash, 'Kennicott' from gpt-5-mini, and 'Subscription' capitalized from gemini-flash (matches image).

rows.description: Molineux (Brazier) in full —
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms pounds as 8 and pence as 11. The shillings digit is highly ambiguous, looking like an 'x' or a poorly formed '0'. gemini-flash correctly interpreted this as '0' based on common ledger practice (which is more convincing than gpt-5-mini's '11'). gemini-flash's description includes the trailing dash which is present.
rows.section_header: Jun 25 At a meeting of the Society upon the Business of Executing y.e Lease of Merton Estate to Mr Oswald Jackson, & settling accts with P.r D.d Turner & with Mr Clarke & Brewster Clerk to y.e Commission, -
rows.english_description: Final payment in full to Molineux, the brazier, for metalwork supplied or services.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Final payment in full to Molineux, the brazier, for metalwork supplied or services, amounting to £8 0s 11d.
